main.description: Get the member operation log for a space. Used for incremental sync of the member list. If a syncer falls behind compaction, oplog replay will produce a hash mismatch against the current commitment; the syncer then falls back to full-state recovery via getMembers. Must be called on the space owner's PDS. Callable with either OAuth (for the space owner) or a space-credential (for syncing services).

limit.description: Maximum number of operations to return.

commit.description: Signed commitment over the current member list. Includes the LtHash digest (commit.hash) and the rev. Only returned when the response drains the oplog to head — backfill responses omit it.

opEntry.description: A single operation in a space's member-list oplog.
